section_analysis.description: Conversational plea. Piano-driven shuffle beat. Bouncy and rhythmic.
Catchy hook. 'Oh! No! No! No!' motif. High melodic density.

lyrics.original: Oh! No! No! No! ちょっと魔がさしたんだ
lyrics.romaji: Oh! No! No! No! Chotto ma ga sashitanda

lyrics.original: まさに恋愛裁判 君は僕にどれくらいの罪を問う？
lyrics.romaji: Masa ni ren'ai saiban Kimi wa boku ni dore kurai no tsumi wo tou?
lyrics.meta: Core metaphor. Legal terminology used for romance.

stylistic_dna.vocal_texture: Hatsune Miku - Clean, moderate tuning, emotive
stylistic_dna.main_instrument: Piano, Bouncy Bass, Light Shuffle Drums
